integration_evidence.summary: Task Thread composer now allows local business input edits and passes the edited same-origin input into Core /tasks readiness/payload construction.

Library can open supported readonly milestone tasks after local runtime readiness even before a liveTaskIds projection already exists; Core submit remains separately gated by runtime/admission/Harbor identity readiness.
Task context uses matching Harbor live identity summary when available instead of hardcoding Harbor fixture in the identity source chip.
Optional packaged smoke action submits a local owner-shaped Xiaohongshu readonly task through the App UI and verifies Core run/result/evidence/session refs render.
